title: rubus libertianus
intro: Rubus libertianus, also known as the Pyrenean raspberry or Spanish bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Pyrenees mountain range between France and Spain. The medicinal properties of Rubus libertianus include its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of consuming Rubus libertianus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Rubus libertianus can be prepared as a tea, juice, or tincture, or used in jams, jellies, and other culinary applications to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
